special_mechanics.name: Special Attack Meter
special_mechanics.description: Decreases with each special move performed; different special attacks consume different amounts. Characters can taunt to decrease opponent's meter. Meter recharges when character retreats into defensive shell.

special_mechanics.name: Dizzy State
special_mechanics.description: Character becomes dizzy after being hit multiple times in succession, allowing opponent to land free attack

special_mechanics.name: Overkills
special_mechanics.description: Stage-specific finishing moves triggered when opponent is defeated and falls into specific areas of the stage background

special_mechanics.name: Grapple System
special_mechanics.description: Executed by standing close to opponent and pressing toward/away with medium or strong punch. Cannot be blocked or escaped.

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Empirical/Qualitative. Wikipedia provides gameplay mechanics and control scheme but lacks precise physics parameters (gravity values, velocities, acceleration rates, sub-pixel data). This is a fighting game where individual character movement parameters are less documented than platformers. No source contained quantified movement data.
